name: disk-space-optimizer
description: Free disk space by diagnosing usage hotspots and removing build artifacts, caches, and stale-repo dependencies while preserving source code, .git history, and active projects.

interface.shortDescription: Free disk space by diagnosing usage hotspots and removing build artifacts, caches, and stale-repo dependencies while preserving source code, .git history, and active projects.
interface.longDescription: Diagnose disk hotspots, check per-repo activity, then remove only safe regenerable artifacts and report the space freed.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Disk Space Optimization safely.
